Check for logical and functional dependencies in file 'shopping_behavior_updated_pre_processed.csv'

------------------------------------------------------------
Data           | shopping_behavior_updated_pre_processed.csv
No. of rows    | 3900                                       
No. of columns | 15                                         
No. of LDs     | 1527                                       
No. of FDs     | 1                                          
------------------------------------------------------------


========================================
Logical Dependencies (LDs)
========================================

Condition | Implication               
--------------------------------------
Q = 0     | Functional dependency (FD)
0 < Q < 1 | Logical dependency (LD)   
Q = 1     | No dependency             
Lower Q   | Stronger dependency       
--------------------------------------

Note: Functional dependencies are a special case of logical dependencies.


Layer 2 (178 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
